name: space-engineer-2-chemistry-plastics
description: Chemistry & Plastics — a Space Engineers 2 mod dataset adding monomer (intermediate), plastic (simple bulk material), and composite plastic (complex reinforced material). Dual feedstock: resin (Forestry hook, bio path) or gasoline (Petroleum Power hook, petro path). Purely additive — no new blocks; crafting happens on vanilla Smelter 2.5 m and Assembler 5 m.
